name: Consumer Discovery
appropriateWhen: Users browse, compare, save, or discover a visual catalogue of real content or products.
inappropriateWhen: The main task is dense administration, regulated data entry, or incident response.
mobileStrategy: Keep discovery context and one-thumb primary actions; use content-aware cropping and progressive filters.
signatureMovePatterns: Derive rhythm, crop, metadata, and color emphasis from the actual catalogue content.
